channel.title: Resources on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Resources on Drupal WxT

item.title: Resources for WxT
item.description: This page simply provides all the relevant WxT related links in a logical fashion. Composer Project Generator Composer template for WxT projects Instantiated Composer Projects (WxT) WxT Open Data Installation Profiles WxT Open Data subprofile Skel skeleton Contributed WxT Projects (no profile dependency) WxT Bootstrap WxT Library
